case_title: CANON KIP ASSOCIATES, LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. MARVIN TOLES et al

docket_entries.description: COURT TRIAL ON JAN-05-2004 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ENTERED, DEPT. 218, COMMISSIONER SUE M. KAPLAN, CLERKS: S.RAVINANTAPRICHA, CSR: BELDON YEE.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-29-2003 Continued To Jan-05-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-05-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
John Zanghi, Esq., for Plaintiff Canon Kip Associates, Limited Partnership.
No appearance by the Defendant Marvin Toles.
09:45 am. - Plaintiff's witness, Joseph Madana the property manager was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - Lease agreement --------------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #2 - Ten day notice --------------- ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises at: 705 Natoma Street #427, San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $558.00
Costs of $261.30
For the total of $819.30.
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-05-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Arshawsky, Esq. for plaintiff
Shadow Martin, Manager for plaintiff, Canon Kip Associates, appearing telephonically
No appearance by defendant

Unlawful detainer settlement conference ordered off calendar. No appearances by defendant. Jury demand stricken. Matter will proceed as a court trial
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott Not reported. (218)
